calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code section 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2024 Continued To Mar-26-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to March 26, 2024 at 10:30am in Department 610.
Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)
